description:
## Context

Slots are the composition API of web components. Currently only measured as part of CEM Completeness (10 points for slot documentation). This deserves its own dimension — a component with undocumented or missing slots is fundamentally harder to use.

## Implementation

Create `packages/core/src/handlers/analyzers/slot-architecture.ts`:

### Scoring Model (100 points, weight: 5, tier: important)

1. **Default slot documentation** (25 points):
   - Has default slot declared: +15
   - Default slot has description: +10
   - Return null for components with no slots (presentational/leaf components — honest scoring)

2. **Named slot documentation** (30 points):
   - Proportional: slots with descriptions / total named slots
   - Full points if all named slots documented

3. **Slot type constraints** (20 points):
   - Slots that specify expected content types or element types
   - Check for `@slot` JSDoc annotations or description mentioning element types

4. **Slot-property coherence** (25 points):
   - When a component has both `slot="label"` and a `label` property, are both documented?
   - When a slot mirrors a property, is the relationship explained?
   - Common patterns: label/icon/header/footer/prefix/suffix slots that often have matching properties
   - Score proportional to coherent pairs / total pairs

### Integration
- Register as dimension 13 in `dimensions.ts`
- Wire into `scoreComponentMultiDimensional()` in `health.ts`
- Confidence: verified (pure CEM analysis)

### Testing
- Test with helix components (rich slot usage: hx-card, hx-dialog, hx-drawer)
- Test with Spectrum components (extensive slot architecture)
- Test null return for slot-less components
- Test slot-property coherence detection
- File: `tests/handlers/slot-architecture.test.ts`

### Key Files
- New: `packages/core/src/handlers/analyzers/slot-architecture.ts`
- Modify: `packages/core/src/handlers/dimensions.ts`
- Modify: `packages/core/src/handlers/health.ts`
- New: `tests/handlers/slot-architecture.test.ts`

### Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Default slot presence and documentation scored
- [ ] Named slot descriptions scored proportionally
- [ ] Slot type constraints detected and scored
- [ ] Slot-property coherence pairs identified and scored
- [ ] Returns null for components with no slots
- [ ] Registered as dimension 13
- [ ] Tests use real CEM fixtures (helix, spectrum, material)
- [ ] All existing tests pass
title: feat: Slot Architecture analyzer — score slot documentation, default slot, and slot-property coherence
